title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Code Llama and other models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama API; install from PyPI as ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model, packaged as a single Docker image.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience wrapper adding interactive REPL, prompt templates and output formatting.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images and compose examples for CPU & GPU inference.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension turning any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot template that streams responses from Ollama.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension for inline code generation and explanation using CodeLlama via Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Plug-in retrieval system for Ollama WebUI using ChromaDB and sentence transformers.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for chatting with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nvidia-jetson
summary: Build scripts and containers for running Ollama on NVIDIA Jetson devices with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into any server channel.
